title: CCP ships as spec plus thin reference toolkit
context: A prose-only spec would drift in implementation; a full product in the core repo would collapse the boundary with Foundry.
decision: Ship CCP as an open spec plus a small local CLI, while keeping rich UX and orchestration in Foundry.
alternatives_considered: Spec only with no executable toolkit
Turn CCP core into a full collaboration product
consequences: The protocol becomes testable and locally usable
Foundry can remain a distinct product implementation
